---
name: Hardware Modeling Issue
about: Report missing or incorrect emulation of hardware or HLE BIOS behavior
title: "[Modeling] "
labels: modeling
assignees: ''
---

## Component / Subsystem

Which part is affected? (e.g. SH-2, VDP1, VDP2, SCSP, SCU, SMPC, CD block, HLE BIOS)

## Summary

What is missing or incorrectly modeled? (e.g. "SH-2 cache is not implemented",
"HLE BIOS call X is unimplemented")

## Current Behavior

How does erings currently behave (or what does it omit)?

## Correct Behavior

How should the real hardware (or BIOS) actually behave?

## Documentation / Reference

Authoritative reference describing the correct behavior - hardware spec section
or manual page, or for HLE the relevant BIOS call / behavior.

## Impact

What does this affect? (specific games, accuracy, performance, or unknown)

## Additional Context

Test cases, traces, or anything else that may help.
